research_topic: AI commercial monetization with durable government moat
latest_delta: Q4 2025 美國商業營收維持三位數成長，商業化假設被強化。
Maven AI 升級為 Program of Record，政府訂單黏著度提升。
短線估值仍高，必須持續監控商業增速是否掉到 50% 以下。
noise_filters: Insider selling headlines without demand change

thesis.statement: 市場仍低估 Palantir 在美國商業 AI 與國防軟體的雙引擎飛輪，只要商業營收維持高成長且政府專案升級為常態預算，估值雖高仍可被更高品質的成長證明支持。
thesis.core_catalyst: 美國商業營收續強與大型政府專案正式預算化。
thesis.market_blind_spot: 市場把 PLTR 視為敘事股，但近兩季已證明商業化與政府續約可同時成立。
thesis.expiry_condition: US Commercial growth 掉到 50% 以下或核心政府專案預算被削弱。

assumptions.statement: US Commercial AI demand can sustain hyper-growth above 80%.
assumptions.verification_method: Quarterly US Commercial revenue growth and customer count.
assumptions.invalidation_condition: US Commercial revenue growth falls below 50% for one full quarter.

assumptions.statement: Government contracts remain sticky and budget-backed.
assumptions.verification_method: Maven/DoD contract status and budget mentions in filings.
assumptions.invalidation_condition: Program of Record gets delayed or defense funding is cut.

assumptions.statement: Margin expansion can accompany revenue acceleration.
assumptions.invalidation_condition: Revenue beats but operating leverage stops improving for two quarters.

risks.statement: Commercial growth normalizes faster than narrative assumes.
risks.response: Pause adds and re-rate to lower EV/Sales.

risks.statement: Government procurement slows with defense budget reprioritization.
risks.response: Exit if budget-backed programs lose priority.

risks.statement: Valuation compresses even while fundamentals stay good.
risks.response: Only act if accompanied by demand deterioration.

valuation_regime.switch_trigger: Commercial growth remains above 80% while margins expand.
valuation_regime.re_rating_logic: The market starts paying for compounding rather than story optionality.
valuation_regime.associated_risk: Any deceleration in commercial growth brings multiple compression first.

scenarios.trigger: US Commercial stays above 80% and government renewals remain intact.
scenarios.logic: Original thesis holds with both engines contributing.
scenarios.action: Hold core and add on controlled pullbacks.

scenarios.trigger: Commercial growth remains above 100% with margin expansion.
scenarios.logic: Narrative shifts from government-heavy to enterprise platform winner.
scenarios.action: Add if valuation expansion is backed by margin improvement.

scenarios.trigger: Commercial growth slows but government stays intact.
scenarios.logic: Multiple compresses before earnings catch up.
scenarios.action: Trim tactical size, keep only high-conviction core.

scenarios.trigger: Defense budget or flagship programs deteriorate materially.
scenarios.logic: The moat claim fails and valuation has little support.

action_rules.condition: US Commercial revenue grows above 100% for two straight quarters and margin expands.
action_rules.action: Add up to max position size.

action_rules.condition: Commercial growth falls below 70% without offsetting government upside.
action_rules.action: Trim tactical adds and revisit valuation regime.

action_rules.condition: Program of Record is downgraded or core defense budget support weakens.

next_must_check_data: Q1 2026 earnings: US Commercial growth, margins, major government renewal cadence.
research_debt: Need cleaner read on UK/FCA contribution size.
Need scenario work on commercial deal concentration.

version_log.reason: Baseline migration from legacy March update.
version_log.impact: Established living thesis and machine-readable state.

seed_events.title: Q4 2025 results showed 137% US commercial growth.
Maven AI became a Program of Record.
